items.title: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
items.summary: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".

items.title: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
items.summary: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.

items.title: China says US should stop 'threats' against Cuba after ex-leader charged
items.summary: It comes after the US charged Cuba's ex-leader with murder, the latest move putting pressure on the regime.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 採竹筍遇1米黑熊貼臉！日本宮城7旬婦揮鋸自衛跌倒重傷
items.summary: 日本宮城縣日前發生一起驚險的黑熊襲擊事件。一名住在宮城縣大崎市的70多歲女性，20日上午在自家後方的竹林採集竹筍時，突然遭到一隻體長約1公尺的黑熊從側面逼近。  《FNN》報...…

items.title: 烏克蘭無人機奔襲八百公里轟炸俄油廠 澤倫斯基曬戰果
items.summary: 烏軍於週四（21日）深夜對俄羅斯薩馬拉州（Samara）斯茲蘭（Syzran）發動無人機襲擊，成功轟炸該市一座隸屬俄羅斯國家石油公司（Rosneft）的煉油廠。  據《路透》...…

items.title: 印度主辦Quad峰會 魯比歐聚焦美能源輸出、安全議題
items.summary: 美國國務卿魯比歐（Marco Rubio）將於23日抵印度，進行為期4天的訪問。美國駐印度大使戈爾（Sergio Gor）表示，美國正致力增加輸出到印度的能源，這也將是魯比歐此行與印度商議的...…
